name: Banana Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 4 Cups French or Sourdough Bread - Day-Old, Cubed (1-inch Pieces)
1 Cup Bananas - Firm, Sliced in 1-inch Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the bread cubes in a greased 2-quart casserole dish; pour butter over and toss to coat.
2. In a medium bowl, lightly beat eggs; add milk, sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
3. Stir in bananas. Pour mixture over bread cubes and stir to coat evenly.
4. Bake, uncovered, at 375°F for 40 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
5. Meanwhile, prepare the sauce: melt butter in a small saucepan.
6. Combine sugar and cornstarch; add to butter.
7. Stir in milk and corn syrup. Cook over medium heat until the mixture comes to a full boil.
8. Boil for 1 minute, then remove from the heat and stir in vanilla.
9. Serve warm sauce over warm pudding.
